summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NeuralTrix AI CMS - all core functionality working perfectly including admin authentication, blog CRUD with content blocks, testimonials/jobs management, and analytics dashboard

design_issues.issue: Stats cards don't load immediately on dashboard

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@neuraltrix.ai / NeuralAdmin2025!)
Admin dashboard loads with proper navigation
Blog CRUD operations - create, read, update, delete articles
Blog editor with content blocks (heading + paragraph)
Job listings CRUD through admin UI
Sidebar navigation between all admin sections
All backend API endpoints (23/23 tests passed)
